home.title: Submit API – Secure form delivery without a backend
home.description: Submit API checks every form submission for spam, viruses and attacks and forwards only clean data to your inbox by email. Ready in minutes, no backend required.

pricing.title: Pricing – Submit API
pricing.description: Transparent, usage-based pricing. Every security feature in every plan. You only pay per request. 30-day free trial.

hero.headline: Secure form delivery — no backend, no spam.
hero.subline: Submit API checks every form submission for spam, viruses and attacks and forwards only clean data to you by email. Just change your form’s action URL — that’s it.

logoCloud.title: Trusted by developers, agencies and businesses.

problem.title: Forms are an open door.
problem.subtitle: Every open form is an invitation — including for the wrong people.

cards.title: Spam flood
cards.text: Bots fill your inbox with junk until real enquiries get lost.

cards.title: Security risk
cards.text: Malicious code, viruses and injection attacks reach you through form fields.

cards.title: Overhead
cards.text: Building, maintaining and securing your own backend costs time and nerves.

solution.title: A secure layer between form and inbox.
solution.text: Submit API sits between your form and your email. Every submission runs through a multi-stage security and automation pipeline. Only checked, sanitized data reaches your inbox — with no backend of your own.
benefits: Less spam, no malicious code — a security layer in front of your inbox.
Ready in minutes — just change the action URL, no backend needed.
Works with any form — static, any framework, no lock-in.
Privacy-friendly, hosted in the EU, transparent processing.

how.title: Up and running in three steps.
how.subtitle: No migration, no backend — just a changed URL.

steps.title: Set the action URL
steps.text: Put your Submit API URL as the action of your HTML form. Nothing else required.

steps.title: Submit API checks & processes
steps.text: Spam, virus and injection checks run automatically, optionally followed by AI analysis.

steps.title: Receive a clean email
steps.text: Only checked data lands in your inbox — additionally via webhook if you like.

features.title: Everything secure forms need.
features.subtitle: Every feature is included in every plan — at no extra cost.

items.title: Spam & bot protection
items.text: Heuristics, keyword and link analysis reliably keep junk out.

items.title: Virus & malware scan
items.text: File attachments are scanned with ClamAV before they reach you.

items.title: Injection & XSS protection
items.text: Header injection, script tags and control characters are neutralized.

items.title: File validation
items.text: Size, MIME and extension checks reliably block .exe, .php and friends.

items.title: Instant email delivery
items.text: Sanitized data straight to your inbox, optionally via webhook too.

items.title: Optional AI analysis
items.text: Automatically categorize, enrich and pre-sort submissions.

items.title: Unlimited forms
items.text: As many forms and endpoints as you want in every plan — no limit.

items.title: Dashboard & live submissions
items.text: Keep an eye on volume and incoming submissions in real time.

security.title: Security is never an upsell — it’s always included.
security.subtitle: Every submission is untrusted input first and runs through a multi-stage pipeline. All checks are included in every plan.

checks.title: Required field & structure checks
checks.text: Empty or tampered requests are rejected.

checks.title: Length & content limits
checks.text: Text fields ~1,000 characters, body ~10,000 characters — against overload.

checks.title: Control-character / encoding protection
checks.text: NULL bytes and non-printable characters are blocked.

checks.title: Email format & injection protection
checks.text: Prevents header injection such as smuggled-in Bcc recipients.

checks.title: URL / link checks
checks.text: Only http/https allowed, javascript: URLs are blocked.

checks.title: File validation
checks.text: Size limit, MIME/extension matching, blocking of .php, .exe, .js.

checks.title: Spam detection
checks.text: Too many links, spam terms, suspicious combinations; CAPTCHA, IP & rate-limiting options.

checks.title: Malware / virus scan
checks.text: File attachments are scanned for malware with ClamAV.

checks.title: XSS, script & header injection protection
checks.text: Script tags removed, HTML escaped, line breaks strictly stripped.

checks.title: Sender / environment checks
checks.text: IP, hostname and referer matching against your allowed domains.

security.note: Important: all security features are included in every plan — never a paid extra.

audience.title: Built for your setup.
audience.subtitle: Whether it’s code, a client project or a first website.

cards.title: Agencies & freelancers

cards.title: Site owners & SMBs
cards.text: No backend, no maintenance. Just set the action URL and receive secure emails — without the jargon.

code.title: Integrate in a minute.
code.subtitle: Pick your way — the result is always a secure, checked delivery.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.subtitle: Everything important about integration, privacy and billing.

items.q: Do I need my own backend?
items.a: No. You only change your form’s action URL to your Submit API address. No server, no database and no custom code required — Submit API handles receiving, checking and delivery.

items.q: Does it work with my framework or static sites?
items.a: Yes. Submit API works with any HTML form — whether it’s a static site, React, Vue, Svelte, WordPress or another framework. Pure static hosting without a server is no problem either.

items.q: How does Submit API protect against spam and viruses?
items.a: Every submission runs through a multi-stage pipeline: spam heuristics with keyword and link analysis, a ClamAV virus scan for attachments, injection and XSS protection, file validation as well as sender and environment checks. Only then is it delivered.
Yes. Hosting takes place in the EU, processing is transparent and limited to delivery. Details are in our privacy policy; we provide a data processing agreement.

items.q: How much does it cost and how is it billed?
items.a: You pay solely by the number of incoming requests per month. All features are included in every plan; only AI analysis is an optional add-on. You start with 30 days free and 300 requests.

items.q: What happens when I reach my request limit?
items.a: Your request limit is a fixed, hard limit — with no extra buffer and no pay-as-you-go. As soon as your monthly quota is reached, we pause live delivery and kindly suggest a suitable upgrade. That keeps your costs fully predictable and means no surprise bills. The moment you upgrade, delivery resumes right away.
Yes. All plans can be cancelled monthly. With annual billing you save two months, but you’re not locked in long term.
Yes. File uploads are supported and go through size, MIME and extension checks plus a ClamAV virus scan before delivery.

items.q: What does the optional AI analysis do?
items.a: AI analysis classifies and categorizes submissions, enriches them with metadata and can prepare auto-replies on request. This helps you pre-sort enquiries faster. It’s optional and costs about 40 percent on top of the chosen plan.
Within minutes. Create an account, generate an endpoint, set your form’s action URL — done. A step-by-step guide is in the docs.

finalCta.title: Get started in minutes — for free.
finalCta.subtitle: 30-day free trial, 300 requests included. No credit card required.

footer.description: Submit API is the secure interface between your web form and your inbox — with spam, virus and injection protection in every plan.

hero.title: One decision, two sliders.
hero.subtitle: Choose your monthly request volume and whether you want AI analysis. You’ll see the price instantly.

calculator.customNote: From 500,000 requests — dedicated queue, SLA & custom terms.

table.title: All plans compared
table.freeNote: Every plan starts with 30 days free and 300 included requests — no credit card required.

included.title: Included in every plan
included.subtitle: You only pay per request — you get all the features.
items: Team members at no extra cost

trial.title: 30-day free trial
trial.text: Start with the full feature set and 300 included requests. No credit card required to start.
trial.limitText: Your quota is a fixed limit — no buffer and no pay-as-you-go. Once it’s used up for the month, live delivery pauses and we kindly suggest a suitable upgrade. This keeps your costs predictable, and everything resumes the moment you upgrade.

addon.title: Optional add-on: AI analysis
addon.text: The only paid extra — a simple “with / without AI” switch. About 40 percent on top of the chosen plan. Categorization, enrichment and optional auto-replies included.

hero.title: Quickstart: ready in 3 steps
hero.subtitle: Create an endpoint, set the action URL and receive checked emails. No backend required.

items.title: Create an account
items.text: Sign up for free in the dashboard. No credit card needed, 30 days and 300 requests included.

items.title: Create a form endpoint
items.text: Create an endpoint in the dashboard and set the recipient email. You receive a unique form ID.

items.title: Set the action URL
items.text: Put the Submit API URL with your form ID as the action in your form — done.

examples.title: Code examples
examples.subtitle: Three ways, one result. Replace YOUR_FORM_ID with your real ID.

responses.title: Response & status codes
responses.note: Example values — adapt them to your final API contract.

rows.meaning: Accepted, delivery runs asynchronously (e.g. with AI analysis).
Validation error — e.g. a required field is missing or a file rejected.
Rate limit reached — please try again later.
Classified as spam or malicious code and rejected.

items.title: File uploads
items.text: Use enctype="multipart/form-data". Attachments are checked for size, MIME type, extension and viruses (ClamAV).

items.title: Webhooks & retry
items.text: In addition to email you can configure a webhook. Failed deliveries are retried automatically.

items.title: Limits
items.text: Text fields are limited to about 1,000 characters, the body to about 10,000 characters. Longer content is rejected.

items.title: Optional AI analysis
items.text: Enable AI analysis in the dashboard to automatically categorize, enrich and pre-sort submissions.

sections.heading: Register entry

Entry in the commercial register.
Register court: [Register court]
Register number: [Register number]

sections.heading: VAT ID
sections.body:
VAT identification number pursuant to § 27 a of the German VAT Act:
[VAT ID]

sections.heading: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV
Dispute resolution
sections.body: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.heading: 1. Controller
sections.body:
The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
[Company name]
[Address]
Email: [Email]

sections.heading: 2. What data we process
sections.body: We process data you actively provide (e.g. during registration or via forms) as well as technically necessary data such as IP address, timestamp and browser information. Form data submitted via Submit API is processed solely for the purpose of security checks and delivery.

sections.heading: 3. Purposes and legal bases
sections.body: Processing is carried out to provide the service (Art. 6 (1) (b) GDPR), to safeguard legitimate interests such as security and spam prevention (Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR) and to comply with legal obligations (Art. 6 (1) (c) GDPR).

sections.heading: 4. Data processing on behalf
sections.body: Where we process data on your behalf, we conclude a data processing agreement (DPA) pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR. [Add details and sub-processors.]

sections.heading: 5. Hosting & storage location
sections.body: Our servers and the processing of form data are located in the European Union. [Specify hosting provider and location.]

sections.heading: 6. Authentication
sections.body: For signing in to the dashboard we use [Auth0/authentication provider]. Login data is processed according to the provider’s specifications. [Add provider and privacy notes.]

sections.heading: 7. Cookies & analytics
sections.body: We only use technically necessary cookies. For reach measurement we use — where enabled — a privacy-friendly analytics tool ([e.g. Plausible]) without cookies and without building personal profiles.

sections.heading: 8. Retention period
sections.body: We store personal data only as long as necessary for the stated purposes or as required by statutory retention periods.

sections.heading: 9. Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.body: For privacy questions reach us at: [Email]. [If appointed: add contact details of the data protection officer.]
